next_steps: Perform a renal biopsy for histopathological classification
Serological testing for autoimmune/glomerular markers including anti-PLA2R, ANA, anti-dsDNA, and C3/C4 levels
Obtain 24-hour urine collection for total protein quantification
Evaluate for serum and urine monoclonal proteins via electrophoresis and immunofixation
Initiate thromboembolic risk assessment and prophylactic anticoagulation if indicated by albumin levels
Start symptomatic management with ACE inhibitor or ARB for antiproteinuric effects and blood pressure control
Optimize thyroid replacement therapy for subclinical hypothyroidism
